title: Add accept-both conflict resolution for knowledge branch

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--accept-both-conflict
comments.content:
Plan: Add accept-both conflict resolution to knowledge branch sync/push flow.

Key changes:
1. Add conflict detection (has_conflict_markers) and resolution (resolve_accept_both) functions to knowledge.rs
2. Add SyncOutcome struct to carry resolved conflict info back to callers
3. Add handle_rebase_conflict() method to KnowledgeManager that aborts rebase, falls back to merge, resolves conflicts with accept-both
4. Modify sync() to return Result<SyncOutcome> - catches rebase conflicts and uses accept-both fallback
5. Modify push() to return Result<SyncOutcome> - catches pull --rebase conflicts and uses accept-both fallback
6. Update commands/knowledge.rs callers to handle SyncOutcome, create crosslink issues for resolved conflicts, and print warnings
7. Add comprehensive unit tests for conflict parsing, resolution, and the full flow

Files to modify:
- crosslink/src/knowledge.rs (core conflict resolution logic + sync/push changes)
- crosslink/src/commands/knowledge.rs (handle SyncOutcome, create issues, print warnings)
